title: [2.1] capabilities: always set ambient and inheritable
body:
change capabilities handling to reflect what docker does.

Bounding: set to caplist
Inheritable: set to caplist
Effective: if uid != 0 then clear; else set to caplist
Permitted: if uid != 0 then clear; else set to caplist
Ambient: clear

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>
(cherry picked from commit 703381b4a2b1dc761ffee0d8e36b47f21ffd92c5)

Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/v2.1/OWNERS)~~ [giuseppe] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Is there an ETA on when a patch release may come out with this fix included? This (in effect #7747) has been holding me back from being able to upgrade.
Podman 2.1.1 doesn't include this patch.  We are getting ready to release podman 2.2 next week.
